mission.title: argo: Cross Build Images for ARM
mission.description: Cross Build Images for ARM. Requested by 76+ users.

steps.title: Check current argo deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo
helm list -n argo 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo installation.

steps.title: Review argo configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo
kubectl get configmap -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo
```
Currently ArgoCD supports building arm64 images but doesn't publish them due to issues with cross-building with normal docker and GitHub Actions (AFAIK). There's some recent advancements that would enable this with GitHub Actions.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Cross Build Images for ARM
steps.description:
## Summary

I added a function to publish arm64 docker image in release workflow using `docker/build-push-action`.

I tested this workflow with my repo and docker hub.
https://github.com/dragoneena12/argo-cd/actions/runs/1045272993
https://hub.docker.com/repository/docker/dragoneena12/argocd

This
```yaml
docker run --rm -it -v $(pwd)/ui/package.json:/src/package.json:ro -v $(pwd)/ui/yarn.lock:/src/yarn.lock:ro -v $(pwd)/cache:/cache --workdir /src node:12.18.4 yarn install --cache-folder /cache
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo
kubectl get events -n argo --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Cross Build Images for ARM" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
## Summary

I added a function to publish arm64 docker image in release workflow using `docker/build-push-action`.

I tested this workflow with my repo and docker hub.
https://github.com/dragoneena12/argo-cd/actions/runs/1045272993
https://hub.docker.com/repository/docker/dragoneena12/argocd

This should be useful for argocd users who use arm64 k8s clusters like raspi4 or M1Mac.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo installed or the issue environment reproducible.
